title: Jschlatt's Christmas Music Discs
description: Adds jschlatt's Christmas album "A Very 1999 Christmas" to the game as music discs.
body:
### **This is a data/resourcepack of Jschlatt's A Very 1999 Christmas album. The SAME file is used in the resourcepack folder and datapack folder**
### It is presented as 8 music discs. 

All 8 are added and are as follows:
- Santa Claus Is Coming To Town
- The Christmas Song
- Let It Snow! Let It Snow! Let It Snow!
- Happy Holiday
- Baby It’s Cold Outside
- White Christmas
- It’s The Most Wonderful Time Of The Year
- Have Yourself A Merry Little Christmas


So far the discs can only be obtained through commands. They can be given to the player using 

# Usage
NEW!!: Added support for disc spawning in end cities. Right now there is a bug I am unaware on how to fix that causes discs to be missing the custom JSCHLATT cover art on the discs. For now discs appear as normal vanilla 13 disc.            (If you know how to fix this bug please join the discord and tell me)

Of course you can still spawn through command:
/function new_music:nameofsong
All of the songs will appear in the tab complete when you start typing.
(When spawned through commands the cover art will appear as normal)

# **Installation:**

Designed for 1.21.9 - 1.21.10
Fully supports 1.21.5 - 1.21.10

This is a datapack/resourepack combo. The same file may be put in the resourcepack folder and in the datapack folder.



### 
### If you have any issues or questions, please report it under the link section or join my discord server for more help and or reporting

(If you know how to fix disc image bug please join the discord and tell me)

also it might tell you in game that this pack isnt supported in the 1.21.10 but it is. just ignore that
